Store.title: Store
Store.description: Represents a local store that lists products on LocalBasket.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Store entity.

teluguName.description: The name of the store in Telugu for voice recognition.

description.description: A brief description of the store.

address.description: The physical address or location of the store.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns the store.

imageId.description: ID for the store's placeholder image.

imageUrl.description: URL for the user-uploaded store image.

latitude.description: The latitude of the store's location.

longitude.description: The longitude of the store's location.

isClosed.description: A flag to indicate if the store is permanently closed.

tables.description: A list of table numbers or names for a restaurant.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product listed by a store. Price is fetched from a central collection.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

name.description: The base name of the product (e.g., 'Potatoes').

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

imageId.description: ID for the product's placeholder image.

imageUrl.description: The data URI of the AI-generated product image.

imageHint.description: A hint for the product image content.

Menu.title: Menu
Menu.description: Represents a restaurant menu, with items extracted by AI.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the LocalBasket application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the user.

accountType.description: The type of account the user has.

imageUrl.description: URL for the user's profile picture.

latitude.description: The latitude of the user's location.

longitude.description: The longitude of the user's location.

fcmToken.description: The Firebase Cloud Messaging token for push notifications.

authenticators.description: A list of WebAuthn authenticators registered by the user.

currentChallenge.description: The current WebAuthn challenge for this user.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents an order placed by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

orderDate.description: The date and time the order was placed.

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the order.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., pending, processing, delivered, billed, completed).

deliveryLat.description: The latitude of the delivery location.

deliveryLng.description: The longitude of the delivery location.

deliveryPartnerId.description: The ID of the user who is assigned to deliver this order.

tableNumber.description: The table number for an in-restaurant order.

sessionId.description: The session ID for a table to group orders.

VoiceOrder.title: VoiceOrder
VoiceOrder.description: Represents a voice-only order placed by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the VoiceOrder entity.

orderDate.description: The date and time the order was placed.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., pending, processing, delivered).

voiceMemoUrl.description: URL to the recorded voice memo audio file.

translatedList.description: The text transcription of the voice memo.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents an item within an order, pointing to a specific product variant.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

variantSku.description: The SKU of the specific product variant that was ordered.

variantWeight.description: The weight of the specific product variant.

quantity.description: The quantity of this variant in the order item.

price.description: The price of the variant at the time of the order.

ProductRecommendation.title: ProductRecommendation
ProductRecommendation.description: Represents a product recommendation for a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductRecommendation entity.

recommendationReason.description: The reason for the product recommendation (e.g., 'Based on past purchases', 'Frequently bought together').

recommendationScore.description: A score indicating the relevance of the recommendation.

timestamp.description: The time the recommendation was generated.

MonthlyPackage.title: MonthlyPackage
MonthlyPackage.description: Represents a pre-defined monthly shopping package offered by a store.

storeId.description: The ID of the store offering this package.

name.description: Name of the package (e.g., 'Family Pack for 3').

memberCount.description: The number of family members this package is designed for.

price.description: The total price for the package.

items.description: A list of products and their quantities included in the package.

CachedRecipe.title: CachedRecipe
CachedRecipe.description: Represents a cached list of ingredients and instructions for a specific recipe to reduce AI calls.

id.description: Unique identifier, typically the normalized dish name plus language code (e.g., 'chicken-biryani_en').

ingredients.description: The list of ingredients for the dish.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the recipe was cached.

CachedAIResponse.title: CachedAIResponse
CachedAIResponse.description: Represents a cached AI response for a general knowledge question.

id.description: Unique identifier, typically the normalized question.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the response was cached.

DeliveryPartner.title: DeliveryPartner
DeliveryPartner.description: Represents a delivery partner, tracking their earnings and payout status.

userId.description: The UID of the user who is the delivery partner. This is the document ID.

totalEarnings.description: The total accumulated earnings since the last payout.

lastPayoutDate.description: The date of the last successful payout.

payoutsEnabled.description: Whether the partner is eligible for payouts.

payoutMethod.description: The preferred method for receiving payouts.

upiId.description: The partner's UPI ID for payments.

Payout.title: Payout
Payout.description: Represents a payout request made by a delivery partner.

id.description: Unique identifier for the payout transaction.

partnerId.description: The ID of the delivery partner requesting the payout.

requestDate.description: The timestamp when the payout was requested.

completionDate.description: The timestamp when the payout was completed.

status.description: The status of the payout request.

payoutMethod.description: The method used for this specific payout.

payoutDetails.description: A snapshot of the payout details used for this transaction (e.g., UPI ID or bank account).

ProductPrice.title: ProductPrice
ProductPrice.description: Defines the canonical pricing and stock for product variants, managed by the admin.

productName.description: The unique, case-insensitive name of the product (e.g., 'potatoes'). This serves as the document ID.

variants.description: A list of available weights, prices, and stock for this product.

sku.description: A unique identifier for the variant (e.g., 'prod-potatoes-1kg').

weight.description: The weight or size of the variant (e.g., '500gm', '1kg').

price.description: The admin-defined price for this variant.

stock.description: The available quantity for this variant.

FailedVoiceCommand.title: FailedVoiceCommand
FailedVoiceCommand.description: Represents a voice command that was not understood by the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the failed command log.

userId.description: The UID of the user who spoke the command.

commandText.description: The transcribed text of the failed command.

language.description: The language detected for the command (e.g., 'en-IN', 'te-IN').

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the command failed.

reason.description: The reason why the command failed (e.g., 'Product not found', 'Incomplete command').

VoiceAlias.title: VoiceAlias
VoiceAlias.description: Represents a voice alias for a specific item (product, store, or command).

key.description: The canonical key for the item (e.g., 'tomatoes', 'go-to-cart').

alias.description: The spoken alias for the item.

type.description: The type of item this alias refers to.

VoiceCommand.title: VoiceCommand
VoiceCommand.description: Represents the core information for a general voice command.

key.description: The unique key for the command (e.g., 'go-to-cart'). Serves as the document ID.

display.description: The user-friendly display name for the command (e.g., 'Go To Cart').

reply.description: The text the voice assistant should speak in response (e.g., 'Opening your cart.').

SiteConfig.title: SiteConfig
SiteConfig.description: Stores global site configuration, like feature flags for AI and live video URLs.

liveVideoUrl.description: The URL for the live order video stream.

isPackGeneratorEnabled.description: Controls the AI Grocery Pack Generator feature.

isRecipeApiEnabled.description: Controls the AI Recipe Ingredients feature.

isGeneralQuestionApiEnabled.description: Controls the general knowledge Q&A feature.

isAliasSuggesterEnabled.description: Controls the AI for suggesting fixes to failed commands.

Voiceprint.title: Voiceprint
Voiceprint.description: Represents a user's enrolled voiceprint for biometric verification.

userId.description: The UID of the user. This is the document ID.

voiceprint.description: An array of numbers representing the extracted features of the user's voice.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the voiceprint was created.

NluExtractedSentence.title: NLU Extracted Sentence
NluExtractedSentence.description: Represents a sentence extracted from a document for NLU rule generation.

EmployeeProfile.title: Employee Profile
EmployeeProfile.description: Stores professional details for an employee, linked to a user account.

userId.description: The auth UID of the user. This is the document ID.

storeId.description: The ID of the store the employee belongs to.

employeeId.description: A unique identifier for the employee within the store.

role.description: The job title or role (e.g., 'Cashier', 'Delivery Staff').

hireDate.description: The date the employee was hired.

salaryRate.description: The employee's hourly or monthly salary rate.

AttendanceRecord.title: Attendance Record
AttendanceRecord.description: Records a single punch-in/punch-out event for an employee.

storeId.description: The store ID where the punch occurred.

workDate.description: The date of the work shift.

workHours.description: Total calculated work hours for the shift.

SalarySlip.title: Salary Slip
SalarySlip.description: A generated salary slip for an employee for a specific pay period.

definition.description: Stores user profile data. Accessible only by the user themselves.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores data related to each store.

params.name: storeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the store.

definition.description: Stores product information as a a subcollection of a store. The 'imageUrl' is a data URI of an AI-generated image.

params.name: storeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the store.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier of the product.

definition.description: Stores menu information for a restaurant.
Stores monthly package deals for a specific store.

params.name: storeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the store.

params.name: packageId
params.description: The unique identifier of the package.

definition.description: Stores order information. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'storeId' for querying and security rules.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier of the order.

definition.description: Stores voice-only orders. Accessible by delivery partners for fulfillment.

params.name: voiceOrderId
params.description: The unique identifier of the voice order.

definition.description: Stores order item information for each order. Includes denormalized 'orderId' for authorization independence.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier of the order.

params.name: orderItemId
params.description: The unique identifier of the order item.

definition.description: Stores product recommendations for each user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: productRecommendationId
params.description: The unique identifier of the product recommendation.

definition.description: Stores cached recipe ingredients to reduce AI usage.

params.name: recipeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the cached recipe, usually the dish name.

definition.description: Stores cached AI responses to general questions.

params.name: responseId
params.description: The unique identifier for the cached response, usually the normalized question.

definition.description: Stores earnings and payout information for delivery partners. The document ID is the partner's user ID.

params.name: partnerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the delivery partner (same as userId).

definition.description: Stores a record of all payout requests for a delivery partner.

params.name: partnerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the delivery partner.

params.name: payoutId
params.description: The unique identifier of the payout request.

definition.description: Admin-managed canonical pricing for product variants. The document ID is the product name.

params.name: productName
params.description: The unique name of the product.

definition.description: Logs voice commands that were not understood by the system.

params.name: commandId
params.description: The unique identifier of the logged command.

definition.description: Stores all voice aliases for products, commands, and stores.

params.name: aliasId
params.description: The unique identifier of the alias document.

definition.description: Stores the core information for a general voice command.

params.name: commandKey
params.description: The unique key for the command (e.g., 'go-to-cart').

definition.description: Stores global site configuration settings, like feature flags for AI.

params.name: configId
params.description: The unique identifier for the configuration document (e.g., 'aiFeatures').

definition.description: Stores a user's enrolled voiceprint for biometric verification. Only the user can read or write their own voiceprint.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, matching their auth UID.

definition.description: Stores sentences extracted from documents for NLU rule training.
Stores an employee's professional and salary details. Writable by the store owner, readable by the employee.

params.name: userId
params.description: The employee's auth UID.

definition.description: An employee's punch-in/out record for a specific shift. Writable by the employee, readable by the store owner.
A generated salary slip for an employee. Writable by the store owner, readable by the employee.
